positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed cosmic floral arrangement featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and intricate celestial vines intertwining with lush tropical foliage. The composition is centered, creating a strong focal point. Use deep jewel tones—sapphire blues, emerald greens, and vibrant magenta accents—contrasted with highly contrasting deep shadows and vibrant star-dust luminosity. Style should be a seamless, elegant hyperrealism blend of Art Nouveau poster design and scientific illustration, optimized for screen printing. Clean silhouettes and perfect symmetry are mandatory. Studio lighting, maximalist detail, clean vector art influence.
negative: blurry, low resolution, bad anatomy, ugly, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noisy, grain, bokeh
